examples: He summoned all the huntsmen together, and bade them go out into the forest with him.
She, however, did everything he bade her, without opposition, silently and with half-shut eyes.
I bade all my friends farewell.
When I bade you good-bye for the summer, I was bracing for the storm ahead.
Mr Obama also bade farewell on Friday to his election campaign manager, David Plouffe.
